$schema-note: XSPEC-237 D4 PoC brownfield tasks. Each task modifies the fixture; groundTruthCallers lists the functions that MUST be updated for the change to be correct (the 'missed call-site' denominator). shouldCallChainHelp=false marks negative controls (pure-internal edits where injecting the call chain should NOT improve the outcome).

tasks.description: Add an optional third parameter `round: boolean = true` to addTax(cents, rate). When false, return the untruncated taxed value. Update every caller accordingly.
Add a required parameter `currency: string` to lineTotal(item, currency) and use it in place of the hard-coded '$'. Update every caller (they must thread a currency through).
Change checkStock to return `{ ok: boolean; available: number }` instead of a bare boolean. Update every caller to read `.ok`.
Rename formatMoney to formatCurrency across the codebase, including the import and every call site.
Add an optional parameter `opts?: { discount?: number }` to cartTotal(items, opts) and apply the discount. Update every caller.
Change formatMoney's internal rounding to use Intl.NumberFormat, keeping the exact same signature and observable output. No caller should need to change.
Refactor reserve's internals to guard against negative stock (clamp at 0), keeping the same signature and behaviour for valid inputs. No caller should need to change.
